headline: Futures steady ahead of CPI; semis lead pre-market action
executive_summary: S&P 500 futures are flat to slightly higher ahead of the June CPI print at 8:30 ET. Nasdaq futures outperform as semis bid on continued AI capex commentary. Treasury yields are little changed; the dollar is firmer against the yen.

stories.headline: NVDA up 2% in pre-market after-hours on reported AI capex upgrade
stories.summary: Nvidia gained in pre-market trading following a Bloomberg report that hyperscaler customers have raised 2025 AI capex guidance by an aggregate 18%. AMD ticked higher in sympathy.

stories.headline: Apple holds flat as analysts weigh iPhone 16 Pro demand signals
stories.summary: Apple shares were little changed after TF International's Ming-Chi Kuo said initial iPhone 16 Pro demand is tracking in line with the 15 Pro, easing concerns about a sell-the-news event.

stories.headline: Tesla slides 1.5% as European registrations continue to decline
stories.summary: Tesla shares declined after JATO Dynamics reported European registrations fell 14% YoY in June, the fourth consecutive monthly decline. Analysts remain divided on the second-half outlook.

stories.headline: Energy names mixed as crude holds near $78 on demand uncertainty
stories.summary: Energy stocks were mixed in pre-market trading with WTI crude steady near $78. Chevron gained 0.4% on an upgrade at Wells Fargo; the broader XLE ETF was flat.

stories.headline: S&P 500 futures flat ahead of June CPI print at 8:30 ET
stories.summary: Index futures are flat to slightly higher ahead of the Consumer Price Index release at 8:30 ET. Consensus expects core CPI at +0.2% MoM and +3.1% YoY; a surprise in either direction will drive rate-cut repricing.

stories.headline: FTC widens Big Tech ad-tech probe, Meta and Google in focus
stories.summary: The FTC has expanded its ad-tech investigation to include additional Google and Meta products, according to a Wall Street Journal report. Both stocks are little changed in pre-market trading.
